title: Rate-limit Forecast Chip — Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for an opt-in on-bar forecast chip projecting rate-limit exhaustion via a new predict.py module.
notes: Implementation plan with checkbox tasks, test snippets, and step-by-step guidance — a build guide, not a decision (ADR), requirement set (PRD), or contract (SPEC). Delegates the actual contract to a referenced SPEC in cross_refs. Classified DOC (context/guide).
